summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MSY Limo Service multi-page website. Backend APIs 100% passing (17/17 tests). Frontend pages all load correctly with proper navigation, footer links, and booking widget integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Webpack dev server shows 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay from third-party mylimobiz.com booking widget scripts. These are expected console errors from the external widget and don't affect functionality.
ui_bugs.details: The errors are from the external booking widget (book.mylimobiz.com) and are expected as noted in the context. The widget itself loads and functions correctly.

passed_tests: Backend API: Input validation (422 for invalid email)
Navigation: Services dropdown with 5 service links
Navigation: Service Areas dropdown with 4 area links
Navigation: Fleet, About, FAQ, Contact links
Navigation: Book Now and Call buttons
Fleet Page: /fleet loads with vehicle information
FAQ Page: /faq loads with 8 accordion questions
Contact Page: /contact loads with form and contact info
Contact Form: All fields present (name, email, phone, message)
Footer: Quick links (Fleet, About, FAQ, Contact)
Schema Markup: LocalBusiness schema in index.html
Schema Markup: FAQPage schema in index.html

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, navigation works, forms functional)

seed_data_creation: Test contact messages and quote requests created during API testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-page MSY Limo Service website fully tested. All routes work: Homepage, 5 service pages (/services/*), 4 area pages (/areas/*), Fleet, About, FAQ, Contact. Backend has 6 endpoints all working. Third-party booking widget from mylimobiz.com shows console errors but functions correctly - these are expected. Schema markup present in index.html for SEO.
notes: The 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay visible in screenshots is from the third-party booking widget (mylimobiz.com) and is expected behavior as mentioned in the testing context. The widget itself loads and functions correctly on all pages.
